ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Candlestick pattern detected */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pattern (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pattern (e.g., reversal, continuation) */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy associated with the pattern */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market being analyzed (e.g., stocks, crypto, forex) */,
  "rr" INTEGER /* Risk/reward ratio */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern */,
  "pattern_bars" INTEGER /* Number of bars in the pattern */,
  "required_trend" TEXT /* Required trend for the pattern */,
  "tickers" INTEGER /* Number of tickers associated with the pattern */,
  "signals" INTEGER /* Number of signals generated */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "trade_bars" INTEGER /* Number of bars in the trades */,
  "edge" REAL /* Edge of the pattern */,
  "edge_per_bar" REAL /* Edge per bar */,
  "confirm_perc" REAL /* Confirmation percentage */,
  "win_perc" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "avg_trade_bars" REAL /* Average trade duration in bars */,
  "avg_win_bars" REAL /* Average win duration in bars */,
  "avg_loss_bars" REAL /* Average loss duration in bars */,
  "cons_wins" INTEGER /* Consecutive wins */,
  "cons_losses" INTEGER /* Consecutive losses */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, exchange, etc.) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the pattern detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who defined the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market being traded (e.g., stocks, crypto, forex) */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Candlestick pattern associated with the strategy */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pattern (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pattern (e.g., reversal, continuation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy (e.g., moving average periods, RSI thresholds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the strategy is currently active */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store backtest results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being evaluated */,
  "win_perc" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "loss_perc" REAL /* Loss percentage */,
  "avg_trade_bars" REAL /* Average trade duration in bars */,
  "avg_win_bars" REAL /* Average win duration in bars */,
  "avg_loss_bars" REAL /* Average loss duration in bars */,
  "edge" REAL /* Edge of the strategy */,
  "edge_per_bar" REAL /* Edge per bar */,
  "backtest_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "backtest_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "profit_factor" REAL /* Ratio of gross profits to gross losses */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Measure of risk-adjusted return */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown percentage */,
  "recovery_factor" REAL /* Ratio of total profits to maximum drawdown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
